prestazioni: Hybrid powertrain recalibration for the **3.0 TDI V6 (CJXC) + electric motor (EAAT)** combo: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash with custom DSG shift logic to prioritize electric torque fill (0-30 mph) while optimizing diesel combustion for 450 Nm peak torque at 1,500 rpm. Includes upgraded **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.3:1 CR) and **MANN+HUMMEL high-flow air filter** with heat-shielded intake piping to reduce IATs by 8°C under sustained load.

BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbocharger (0.85 A/R, 62mm compressor) with **custom 3D-printed titanium compressor housing** to replace the stock **Garrett GT2260VK** for 32 psi peak boost (vs. 22 psi stock), paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** for closed-loop AFR targeting 11.8:1 under WOT. Requires **Mishimoto aluminum intercooler core** (4.5" thick, 50% larger than OEM) and **Vibrant 1799 silicone couplers** to eliminate boost leaks.

Hybrid battery bypass system: **EV West 48V LiFePO4 battery pack** (20 kWh, 300A continuous) with **Orion BMS 2** to replace the stock NiMH pack, enabling 100% electric-only mode up to 80 mph (vs. 62 mph stock) and **regenerative braking tuning via Cobb Accessport** to adjust regen aggressiveness (0-100% scale) via steering wheel paddles. Includes **AEM EV VCU** to manage torque split between the CJXC diesel and electric motor for 0-60 mph in 4.9s (vs. 5.9s stock).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (Q7 e-tron-specific, 50mm rear fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** (pre-preg autoclave, 2x2 twill weave) and **RWB-style extended wheel arches** to fit **BBS LM-R 10.5x22" ET35 wheels** (staggered 11.5x22" rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (285/30 front, 305/25 rear). Requires **H&R TRAK+ wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear)** for proper clearance.

Full **Vorsteiner V-FF107 carbon fiber front bumper** with integrated **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (heat-extracting vents over the CJXC turbo) and **custom 3D-printed active grille shutters** (controlled via Arduino + temperature sensors) to optimize aerodynamics. Rear features a **Rieger Tuning RS6-style diffuser** with **dual 4" titanium exhaust tips** (custom fabrication by **Supersprint**) and **LED sequential turn signals** (Osram LEDriving SL 140).

Interior: **Recaro Sportster CS seats** (Q7 e-tron-specific mounting brackets) with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** and **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (12 o’clock marker, Alcantara + carbon fiber). Dash overlay by **034Motorsport** (carbon fiber + aluminum trim) with **AEM CD-7 dash logger** (replaces stock instrument cluster) and **custom hybrid powertrain gauge pod** (boost, battery SOC, torque split) mounted in the center console. Headliner replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme sound deadening** and **Alcantara suede** (custom stitching by **Katzkin**).
